title: Nostro Vostro Break Resolution
description: A reconciliation and back-office workflow that resolves breaks, validates accounting alignment, and closes audit-critical exceptions. Focus case: nostro vostro break resolution.
assumptions: Unique identifiers exist for payment messages, settlement events and ledger entries to enable reliable linking.
Operational users (operators) have authority to perform linking, approvals and to create remediation tickets.
Counterparty confirmations and settlement events are eventually available for consumption by the workflow.
Ledger and external transaction snapshots are consistent for the period under reconciliation.
risks: Missing or ambiguous identifiers prevent deterministic matching, increasing manual investigation workload.
Stale or delayed settlement confirmations lead to incorrect case closure or duplicate adjustments.
Incorrect application of fees or adjustments results in GL misalignment and regulatory exposure.
Inadequate escalation routing may leave high-risk breaks unresolved past SLA, causing audit findings.
